rulings.Case Title: KATHRYN ZUSCHIN VS. NEW CALIFORNIA LAND COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, March 29, 2011, line 1. DEFENDANT DARIN BROWN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Motion to quash service of summons denied. Plaintiff has demonstrated due diligence prior to substitute service. Further, service was not defective. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, March 29, 2011, line 2. DEFENDANT COSIMO SPERA'S Motion For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Void Default And Default Judgment And Granting Defendant Leave To Defend. Granted. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: CACH, LLC VS. PARIS L. VIGIL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, March 29, 2011, line 2. PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S Notice of Hearing on Claim Of Exemption. Claim of exemption denied. Judgment debtor needs to show proof that funds are actually disability retirement benefits. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. EVENT PRODUCTIONS, INC., A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For An Order 1. Compelling Answers To Form Interrogatories, 2. Compelling Answers To Special Interrogatories 3. Compelling Production Of Documents 4. Deeming Requests To Admit Admitted
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, March 29, 2011, line 3. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S Motion For An Order 1. Compelling Answers To Form Interrogatories, 2. Compelling Answers To Special Interrogatories 3. Compelling Production Of Documents 4. Deeming Requests To Admit Admitted. Motion to compel answers/responses to form interrogatories, special interrogatories, production of documents, request for admissions granted. New response must be served within 15 days of notice of entry of order. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICK J. MCGUIRE VS. STATE OF CALIFORNIA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For An Order Granting Petition For Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus Reversing California Unemployment Insurance Appeals Board Decision
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, March 29, 2011, line 8. PETITIONER PATRICK MCGUIRE'S Motion For An Order Granting Petition For Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus is denied. There is substantial evidence to support the A.L.J. finding and no prejudicial abuse of discretion. The court properly interpreted and applied Cal. Unemp. Ins. Code 455(e). =(302/LMG)
